description: Calculate P&C insurance industry profitability metrics for 2018-2022 in the open workbook 'pc_industry_ratios.xlsx'. In the 'Ratio_Analysis' sheet, calculate Loss Ratios, Expense Ratios, Combined Ratios, and Operating Ratios for all 7 lines of business using the data from 'Industry_Data'. Add 'PROFITABLE' or 'UNPROFITABLE' flags based on whether the Combined Ratio is less than 100. In the 'Performance_Summary' sheet, calculate 5-year averages, premium-weighted industry averages, year-over-year changes, and 4-year CAGRs for Net Written Premium. Identify the 'Worst Performing Line' for each year and flag 'DETERIORATING' lines where the 2022 Combined Ratio is greater than both the 5-year average and the 2021 Combined Ratio. Use formulas for all calculations and save the workbook.
